comments.body: i need to do this in JAVA and can one help me in writing a simple program to interact with JIRA through Command Line.

answers.body: If JIRA CLI does this, then I'd install that. Otherwise you could try using jira-python and the create_issue_link method. This assumes that your JIRA version is 5.x or later. http://jira-python.readthedocs.org/en/latest/

title: Hlw to develop a command line interface where a text or XML file can be sent to a JIRA to execute multiple individual/unique tasks
body:
I could not get how I can perform unique individual tasks like, for example:

50 issues to link with 50 different issues.

I have entered the ISSUE number, link type and the target issue number in an excel sheet.

Now I need to perform action of linking the issues with its target as mentioned in the Excel sheet through the command line.

Could you please help me in this regard.

We don't have Jira command line interface plugin installed.
